creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 5/11/12 2:30 AM, Takeshi MUTOH wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/167312; it has been noted by GNATS.
>

>   >  =3D=3D=3D>   Installing for ja-seaside-070930.s38_1
>   >  =3D=3D=3D>    ja-seaside-070930.s38_1 depends on executable: squeak - =
interesting.. I see.

it looks like some of the patch didn't take.  I will do it again.

line one of log shows:

building ja-seaside-080908.s39 in directory 
/disk1/tinderbox/7-scheidell_I386

line 90 clearly shows the old distfiles, etc.

Attempting to fetch file:///distcache/squeak/Seaside-JPatched070930-sq38.zip

not sure what happened.  something on my tinderbox I suspect.

Ill doublecheck.
